skills.name: anysearch
skills.description: 实时搜索与网页内容抽取 Skill。用于需要当前信息检索、事实核验、GitHub/文档/网页搜索、垂直领域搜索、批量搜索、URL 内容提取，或从问题出发发现相关 Skill/开源资料的任务；支持中文查询、中文总结和中文工作流说明。

skills.name: skill-spark
skills.description: 使用 skill-spark 管理 AI coding agent skills。用于安装 Skill、同步到 Codex/Claude Code/OpenCode/Trae/Kimi 或自定义 agent、解释 agent 目录差异、维护 skills.lock、执行 list/outdated/update/remove/doctor，以及添加自定义 agent 目录配置。

skills.name: gh-create-release
skills.description: Create GitHub releases using the gh CLI tool. Use when the user wants to (1) create a new GitHub release for a tag, (2) draft or publish a release with notes, (3) upload release assets/binaries, (4) create a prerelease, (5) generate release notes automatically, or (6) extract release notes from a CHANGELOG.md file. Covers workflows from simple tag-based releases to complex releases with multiple assets and custom notes.

skills.name: git-workflow
skills.description:
基于 github-cli-skill 的 GitHub Issue 工作流 Skill。
输入任务描述 → 创建 Issue body 作为唯一主记录 → Agent 执行任务（含轻量计划/测试）→ 更新 Issue body 并关闭 Issue。
TRIGGER: When user asks to "execute task", "执行任务", "implement task", "run task", "complete task",
references tasks from a task file (e.g., "Task 9", "Task 3"), or says @tasks/issues/ to execute a specific task AND wants GitHub Issue tracking.
Do not use when the user explicitly asks for local-only/offline workflow; use local-workflow instead.

skills.name: github-cli
skills.description: GitHub CLI operations helper. Use when the user needs gh commands for repository creation, issue listing/viewing/commenting/closing, or small GitHub CLI snippets without running the full git-workflow Issue lifecycle.

skills.name: local-workflow
skills.description: 本地任务工作流：读取 task 文件，创建本地追踪记录，AI 实现任务，更新追踪。无需 GitHub Issue，适用于本地开发、离线开发、私有项目或用户明确要求 local/offline/no GitHub 的场景。默认不提交或推送代码；只有用户明确要求或使用 --commit/--push 时才执行 git commit/push。

skills.name: scanning-for-secrets
skills.description: Use when about to commit or push code, or when GitHub push protection blocks a push. Scans staged files for accidentally included secrets, tokens, API keys, and credentials.

skills.name: thought-distiller
skills.description:
名人思想蒸馏器。从零开始调研任意公众人物，提炼其思维操作系统——心智模型、决策启发式和表达DNA，
输出可安装运行的 AI Skill。覆盖六维调研、三重验证、结构化解码、质量验证和交叉比对。
当用户提到「蒸馏某人的思想」「提取某人的思维框架」「创建某人的AI分身」「调研某人的心智模型」时使用。
即使用户只是说「分析Naval的思维方式」「乔布斯是怎么做决策的」也可触发。

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create, update, evaluate, and optimize AI agent skills in English or Chinese. Use when the user wants to create a new SKILL.md, convert a workflow into a skill, improve an existing skill, design evals, compare versions, optimize triggering descriptions, or apply a SkillOpt-style loop with rollout, reflection, edit ranking, rewrite, validation gate, and meta-skill memory. 中文场景：创建 Skill、优化 Skill、写双语 Skill、设计评估集、从失败案例改进技能文档、用 SkillOpt 方法迭代 Skill。

skills.name: frontend-code-structure
skills.description: 前端业务域代码组织与模块化重构

skills.name: frontend-dev
skills.description: Next.js 或者tanstack + TypeScript + shadcn/ui 前端开发。适用于创建页面、组件、表单、数据表、Dashboard 和 SaaS 界面。

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Discover and install agent skills from local manifest, skills.sh, flins.tech, SkillsLLM, and other sources in data/sources.yaml.

skills.name: scaffold-app
skills.description: Guide for creating a new app from an external template repo (not stored in agentway).
